import React from "react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; const FEATS = [ { icon:"🧠", t:"AI Career Prediction", d:"TF-IDF ML matches your skills to 20+ career paths with percentage scores" }, { icon:"🗺️", t:"Career Roadmap", d:"Step-by-step guide with timelines, courses, and milestones per career" }, { icon:"📅", t:"Personalized Study Plan", d:"Graph-based learning path with daily/weekly schedule generation" }, { icon:"📜", t:"Certificate Verifier", d:"OCR reads your certificates, extracts skills, and awards points" }, { icon:"🏆", t:"Gamified Challenges", d:"Weekly skill challenges, badges, streaks, and a community leaderboard" }, { icon:"👥", t:"Student Community", d:"LinkedIn-style social feed, follow peers, share achievements" }, { icon:"💬", t:"Real-time Chat", d:"Socket.io powered 1-on-1 and group study room chat" }, { icon:"🎓", t:"Mentor Matching", d:"Match with senior students and professionals by skill area" }, { icon:"🏢", t:"Internship & Job Board", d:"AI-matched internships and jobs based on your current skills" }, { icon:"🎯", t:"Virtual Events", d:"Career talks, resume reviews, and live coding sessions" }, { icon:"💼", t:"Interview Prep", d:"5-round preparation: Aptitude, Technical, DSA, HR, System Design" }, { icon:"🤖", t:"AI Career Assistant", d:"Claude-powered chatbot for personalized career guidance" }, ]; export default function Landing() { const nav = useNavigate(); return (
